 Nested Loop  (cost=0.27..30.52 rows=5 width=12) (actual time=0.011..0.014 rows=2 loops=1)
   Buffers: shared hit=13
   ->  Seq Scan on joecap.t_small s  (cost=0.00..1.05 rows=5 width=4) (actual time=0.004..0.005 rows=5 loops=1)
         Buffers: shared hit=1
   ->  Index Scan using t_items_pkey on joecap.t_items i  (cost=0.27..5.89 rows=1 width=8) (actual time=0.001..0.001 rows=0 loops=5)
         Index Cond: (i.id = s.id)
         Buffers: shared hit=12
Settings: enable_hashjoin = 'off', enable_mergejoin = 'off', search_path = 'joecap'

--- stats ---

  - planning: 0.243 ms
  - execution: 0.030 ms
